evals.prompt: hey where was i? just opened a new session on hypercode, cant remember what i was doing last time
evals.expected_output: A short ADHD-friendly briefing: last 2-3 things built, any manual steps pending, ONE clear next action, and a short backlog list. Under 25 lines. Warm tone. Ends with one question.

evals.prompt: catch me up on the project. i been away a few days and i forget what i built and whats next on hypercode
evals.expected_output: Reads WHATS_DONE.md and git log, delivers recent wins and a specific next move. Not a wall of text. No more than 25 lines. Should mention something from the NEXT UP list specifically.

evals.prompt: remind me what the single most important thing to do next is on the hypercode project
evals.expected_output: Reads WHATS_DONE.md NEXT UP section, picks the most important item, gives a specific actionable next step with the actual command or action needed. Short. Direct. One clear answer.
